input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.1.1
            TITLE: the structural equivalency spreadsheet must show that the design is equivalent to a welded

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.1.1: The Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet must show that the design is Equivalent to a welded
F.7.1.1 The Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet must show that the design is Equivalent to a welded 
frame in terms of energy dissipation, yield and ultimate strengths in bending, buckling and 
tension

final_answer: rule F.7.1.1: The Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet must show that the design is Equivalent to a welded frame in terms of energy dissipation, yield and ultimate strengths in bending, buckling and tension
